screenshot_notes.desktop: Office scene renders cleanly at 1280x800. Thought bubble active ('Wait you shipped at THIS hour?! Legends. 🏆'). All characters present: Luna, Sofia, Carlos, Maya, Dave + Bloberto. Sprint board top-right shows QA×1. Coffee Triple Shot zone visible. Vibe: Crushing It. Wall clock rendering in scene.
screenshot_notes.mobile: 375x812 shows compressed but functional office. Thought bubble ('I knew all along this team was special.') slightly overlaps characters. Header row intact. Tab bar visible. Bottom scroll reveals footer. Characters readable but small.

thought_bubble_raf_leak.evidence: Lines 1492-1497: cleanup function now calls cancelAnimationFrame(thoughtRaf1Ref.current) AND cancelAnimationFrame(thoughtRaf2Ref.current), plus clearTimeout on both schedule and hide refs. Double rAF pattern retained but properly cancelled. Fix verified.

post_huddle_timestamp_freeze.evidence: Lines 1025-1035: ConferenceTable now has two complementary setTick intervals — one fires every 30s during active huddle (meetingWorkers.length >= 2), one fires every 30s post-huddle (length < 2). This ensures getRelativeTime(h.endedAt) is recalculated every 30s in both states. Fix verified — timestamp will no longer freeze after huddle ends.

office_jsx_monolith.evidence: Office.jsx is now 1953 lines, up from 1944 in review #106. File is actively growing. Still zero component extraction. No components/ directory exists. Only CharacterAvatar and Character are memo-wrapped sub-components; ConferenceTable, WallClock, AwaySign, WindowElement, VibeShockwave all still embedded in the same 1953-line file.

app_jsx_monolith.evidence: App.jsx is still exactly 1590 lines. Zero extraction. WorkerCard, StatsBar, ActivityLog, VibeSparkline, DeltaBadge, ProgressBar, LoadingSkeleton, EmptyState, StatusBadge all defined inline. No separate component files created.

suggestions.title: Office.jsx monolith now 1953 lines — still growing (STRIKE 14)
suggestions.description: Office.jsx grew by 9 lines since review #106 (1944 → 1953). This has been flagged for 14 consecutive reviews with zero action. Minimum viable extraction: move CharacterAvatar+Character into src/components/Character.jsx (already memo-wrapped, cleanest split), ConferenceTable into src/components/ConferenceTable.jsx, WallClock into src/components/WallClock.jsx. Each is self-contained. This would drop the core file below ~1400 lines immediately.

suggestions.title: App.jsx monolith at 1590 lines — unchanged (STRIKE 2)
suggestions.description: App.jsx has not changed in size since review #106. Contains 12+ component definitions inline (WorkerCard, StatsBar, ActivityLog, VibeSparkline, DeltaBadge, ProgressBar, LoadingSkeleton, EmptyState, StatusBadge, ActivityLogEntry, ErrorBoundary, TabBar). WorkerCard alone is ~110 lines and is already React.memo-wrapped — trivial to extract. At minimum: extract WorkerCard and ActivityLog into separate files this sprint.

suggestions.title: ConferenceTable has two redundant setTick useEffects where one would do
suggestions.description: Lines 1026-1035: two useEffect hooks share a single useState tick to force re-renders every 30s. Effect 1 runs when meetingWorkers.length >= 2, Effect 2 when < 2. This is clever but needlessly complex — a single unconditional setInterval would achieve the same result with no branching logic. Also introduces a subtle race: when meetingWorkers.length transitions, both effects re-evaluate in the same render cycle, briefly creating two concurrent intervals before cleanup. Consolidate into one effect with no guard condition.

suggestions.title: 125 @keyframes in Office.css with no will-change declarations on animated elements
suggestions.description: Office.css defines 125 @keyframes (counted) across 2857 lines. None of the animated elements use will-change: transform or contain: layout to hint the GPU compositor. Given ~15+ simultaneously running CSS animations (ambient particles, thought bubble, shockwave, coffee steam, clock frantic-tick, badge-pop, door-swing, etc.), the browser must recalculate layout on each frame without compositor promotion. Add will-change: transform to .ambient-particle, .vibe-shockwave, .thought-bubble, .coffee-steam, .office-wall-clock g elements.

suggestions.title: Thought bubble overlaps character grid on mobile (375px)
suggestions.description: On mobile at 375x812, the Bloberto thought bubble ('I knew all along this team was special.') renders with absolute positioning that causes it to overlap the character row below Bloberto's desk card. The bubble is ~200px wide but the mobile container compresses character spacing. Needs a max-width and repositioning at <= 480px breakpoint, or a translateX clamp to keep it within the office boundary.

suggestions.title: Interactive Character elements missing explicit role='button' declaration
suggestions.description: Character components (memo-wrapped at line 653) receive tabIndex=0 and onKeyDown handlers (Enter/Space) when onClick is provided, making them keyboard-accessible. However, the root div has no role='button' attribute — screen readers cannot identify these as interactive without it. The aria-label is present but without role='button', the interactive affordance is invisible to AT. Add role='button' conditionally when onClick is defined.

suggestions.title: No src/components/ directory — all components remain co-located in 2 monolith files
suggestions.description: After 14 reviews flagging the monolith problem, there is still no src/components/ directory. Utils were extracted to src/utils/ (constants.js, quotes.js, vibe.js, time.js, safeSave.js) which is great — but the same discipline has never been applied to components. Creating src/components/ is a one-command operation. The utils extraction proves the team knows how to do it. This is purely a prioritization failure.

suggestions.title: Mobile header button bar overflows on narrow screens
suggestions.description: At 375px, the header shows 'Good evening, LEGEND 🔥 · Wednesday, Mar 11' + '🔥 Crushing It' button + notification icon + sun icon in a single row. The greeting text is bold/underlined and takes significant space. On very narrow devices (320px) this will overflow. The greeting truncates but the button cluster could wrap. Consider hiding the greeting text below 400px or switching to an icon-only status pill.

suggestions.title: Coffee corner 'TRIPLE SHOT' label slightly clipped at right edge of office viewport
suggestions.description: On desktop 1280x800, the 'COFFEE TRIPLE SHOT' label in the top-right corner of the office scene is partially clipped by the right edge of the office-viewport container. The coffee mug SVG renders fully but the text label appears to extend beyond the boundary. Check .coffee-corner positioning and consider adding overflow: visible or padding-right to the office viewport.

suggestions.title: Plant growth system has no reset mechanism visible in UI
suggestions.description: The plant stage system (seedling → sprout → small-plant → leafy → blooming) is driven by vibeStreak prop. When streak resets to 0 (back to seedling), the milestone toast fires only when going UP (lines 1327-1332). There's no toast or notification for streak reset events (line 1334 handles it silently). Users who lose their streak get no feedback. Consider adding a brief 'Oh no, the ficus wilted 🥀' toast on downgrade.
